top_signals.title: More than 200 arrested in cyber raids aimed at Middle East scam networks
top_signals.summary: Investigators found hundreds of compromised devices that were used as part of the cybercriminal operation and notified device owners as part of the raids.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sweden Picks France’s Naval Group for $4B Frigate Deal
top_signals.summary: Sweden will order four navy frigates from France's Naval Group in a $4 billion deal that will triple its air defence capacity as the new NATO member focuses on security threats in the Baltic Sea, its prime minister said on Tuesday.Sweden is…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Political and Economic Shifts Cause Massive 42% Clean Energy Slump
top_signals.summary: The world’s largest two economies, the United States and China, are both majorly cooling off on investments in clean energy manufacturing, but for very different reasons. In China, the decline in investing from peak levels in 2023 reflects a market correction after years of oversupply and a slowdown in economic growth. In the United States, the trend comes as a reflection of shifting policy priorities and the private sector’s reaction to political uncertainty in the Trump era. The result is a slowdown in clean energy manufacturing investing…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
